title: aeschynanthus calanthus
intro: Aeschynanthus calanthus, also known as the 'Mistress of the Morning', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus calanthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
